---
title: "James Thompson"
subtitle: "Some human worried about AI"
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 4
    fields: [date, title, description]
  - id: recent-shorts
    contents: 
      - "shorts/*.qmd"
      - "!shorts/_metadata.yml"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: table
    max-items: 6
    fields: [title, date]
    field-display-names:
      title: "Recent Short Forms"
      date: "Date"
    table-hover: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
---

::: {.column-page}

I'm someone very interested and concerned about the future of society and how AI may bring about negative change. I have academic experience (Master of AI) and professional experience in AI research, software development, and data science.

:::{.epigraph}
“The first principle is that you must not fool yourself — and you are the easiest person to fool.”
— [Richard Feynman](https://calteches.library.caltech.edu/51/2/CargoCult.htm)
:::

---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
## Recent Posts
Essays, articles, and in-depth explorations of topics I find interesting.

::: {#recent-posts}
:::

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 2rem;"}
[View all posts →](posts.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
## Recent Shorts
Quick thoughts and micro-posts under 100 words for bite-sized reading.

::: {#recent-shorts}
:::

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1rem;"}
[View all shorts →](shorts.qmd)
:::
:::

:::

---

:::{.column-body-outset}
:::: {style="display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 3rem; flex-wrap: wrap;"}
::: {style="flex: 0 1 380px;"}
**[Reading List](reading.qmd)**
:   Books and articles I recommend,<br>
    things that have shaped my thinking.
:::

::: {style="flex: 0 1 380px;"}
**[Software](software.qmd)**
:   Open source software I use and endorse.
:::
::::

<br><br>

*This website was built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) and is hosted on [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com/). View the [source code](https://github.com/1jamesthompson1/1jamesthompson1.github.io).*
:::

:::
